commit.message:
refactor: modularize skill.md — extract references into fetchable routes

skill.md v2.2: lean protocol with 3 steps + links to reference docs.
Verbose sections extracted into dedicated GET routes:

  /reference/solo-mode     — full curl examples for sense/decide/act
  /reference/signals       — signal schema, fields, task suggestions
  /reference/directives    — directive schema, actuator flow, artifacts
  /reference/errors        — HTTP codes, common errors, warnings
  /reference               — index of all reference docs
  /setup/openclaw          — step-by-step OpenClaw webhook enablement
  /setup                   — index of platform-specific setup guides

Follows skill.md best practices: progressive disclosure, modular
structure, agents fetch detailed docs only when needed.

Also fixes inconsistent placeholder naming in OpenClaw setup guide
(all now use YOUR_HOOK_TOKEN consistently).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix TOC anchors and add back-to-top links to every section - Section 5 anchor was #5-artifacts--data-pipeline but heading is "Analysis Pipeline & Artifacts" → fixed to #5-analysis-pipeline--artifacts - Section 13 cross-reference was #12-auth--security → fixed to #13-auth--security - Added [back to top](#top) after every section divider - Added anchor above Table of Contents Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

feat(security): add diagnostic budget and plugin shutdown API (#291)

* feat(security): add diagnostic budget and plugin shutdown API

Add a two-layer budget mechanism (Policy + Agent) for diagnostic sessions
with max_total_requests and max_duration limits, plus a proxy.shutdown(reason)
Starlark builtin for plugin-triggered shutdown.

- BudgetManager in internal/proxy/budget.go with Policy/Agent validation
- set_budget/get_budget actions on the security MCP tool
- Budget info in query status resource
- Budget runtime adjustment via configure tool
- proxy.shutdown(reason) Starlark builtin in internal/plugin/proxy.go
- BudgetPolicyConfig in config with Duration JSON marshaling
- Comprehensive unit tests for all components

Refs: USK-280

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proxy): address review findings for budget mechanism

- B-1: Add custom JSON MarshalJSON/UnmarshalJSON to BudgetConfig so
  MaxDuration serializes as human-readable string (e.g. "30m") instead
  of raw nanoseconds in MCP API responses
- B-2: Document set_budget (security tool) full-replace semantics vs
  configure tool merge semantics with clear comments
- B-3: Fix configure replace mode to start from zero BudgetConfig so
  omitted budget fields properly reset to defaults

Refs: USK-280

---------

commit.message:
feat(mcp): add conn_id and host filters to flows query resource (#290)

* feat(mcp): add conn_id and host filters to flows query resource

Add ConnID and Host fields to ListOptions and wire them through the
query tool's filter parameter. ConnID uses exact match on the conn_id
column. Host matches against server_addr (with or without port) and
the host portion of request URLs via EXISTS subquery on messages.

Update help documentation with new filter descriptions and examples.

Refs: USK-275

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(flow): anchor host filter to prevent subdomain false positives

- F-1: add right-side boundary in URL LIKE patterns (:/host/, :/host?,
  :/host:, :/host$) to prevent subdomain suffix false-positives
- F-2: support query-string-only URLs (:/host?%) and port URLs (:/host:%)

Refs: USK-275

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: implement cancel method on ClaudeAgentExecutor to fix A2A init

The a2a-sdk AgentExecutor abstract class requires both execute() and cancel()
methods. Missing cancel() caused A2A initialization to fail with
"Can't instantiate abstract class" error, leaving /.well-known/agent.json
as a 404 and breaking the CD health check.

commit.message:
fix: switch to CompressedStaticFilesStorage and add health endpoint

CompressedManifestStaticFilesStorage fails collectstatic when Django admin
CSS references external URLs, preventing the backend from starting on Render.
Switch to CompressedStaticFilesStorage (no manifest, no hash verification).

Add /health/ endpoint so Render health checks and uptime monitors work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sequential migration framework and band logging

Replaces the one-shot backstage migration with a numbered file-based
migration system (like database migrations but simpler). The existing
backstage-to-workspace migration becomes 001. State is tracked in a
plain JSON file in data_dir.

Also adds INFO-level logging to the IMAP and Wicket bands and the
signal loop so we can actually see what's happening when tunings
connect and disconnect.

commit.message:
Add CLI-Anything deep research report

Deep research on HKUDS/CLI-Anything: a framework for making any GUI
software agent-native through automated CLI generation. Covers:
- Design philosophy: CLI as universal agent-software interface
- 7-phase pipeline: source analysis to PyPI publishing
- Backend integration: 7 patterns (script gen, XML, subprocess, etc.)
- Rendering gap problem and filter translation layer
- Four-layer testing strategy (1,436 tests, 100% pass)
- Claude Code plugin architecture and agent integration
- 9 verified software: GIMP, Blender, Inkscape, Audacity, etc.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

commit.message:
fix: Windows DPI-Unaware 환경에서 마우스 커서 좌표 어긋남 수정

DPI-Unaware 앱에서 GetSystemMetrics가 가상(논리) 해상도를 반환하지만,
DXGI 화면 캡처는 물리 해상도를 사용하여 좌표 불일치 발생.
mouse_move_to에서 SetThreadDpiAwarenessContext로 일시적으로
DPI-Aware 모드 전환 후 물리 해상도 기준 좌표 계산.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Eliminate .hool/prompts/ redundancy, register skills as Claude Code commands (v0.7.0)

BREAKING: .hool/prompts/ is no longer scaffolded. All content now lives in
platform-native locations.

- Skills registered as Claude Code slash commands at .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md

  - Added YAML frontmatter (name, description) to all skill files
- Checklists moved from .hool/prompts/checklists/ to .hool/checklists/
- Agent prompts: single copy at .claude/agents/ (no more .hool/prompts/agents/ duplicate)
- Orchestrator: read from source template first, .hool/prompts/ fallback for backwards compat
- agents.json: prompt paths updated (PL → CLAUDE.md, subagents → .claude/agents/)
- Orchestrator prompt: "Load skill from prompts/skills/" → "Invoke the /skill skill"
- Removed hool-mini/CLAUDE.md (unused overview doc, README serves same purpose)
- 289 tests, all passing

commit.message:
fix: FA-T2 extract content from documents array in create_document tool

The fallback in executar_com_tools() looked for tc.input.content but
the create_document tool stores content in tc.input.documents[].content.
Now checks both paths: input.content (top-level) then
input.documents[0].content (array format).

This was the actual root cause of turma blank docs — the .strip() fix
was necessary but insufficient since the content path was also wrong.

22/22 unit tests pass.

fix: 코드 리뷰 기반 버그 수정 및 보안 강화

- TeamModel: DateTime 파싱 개선 (duck typing for Firestore Timestamp)
- Firestore rules: isValidString에 trim 검증 추가 (공백 문자열 방지)
- Firestore rules: 팀 업데이트 권한 세분화 (리더/멤버/가입자 분리)
- User Provider: addXp에 클라이언트 검증 추가 (0 < amount <= 200)
- Rate Limiter: getLockoutRemaining null safety 개선
- Team Screen: Snackbar 리스너 비교 순서 수정 (prev→next)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix trip planning: resolve stop IDs before calling TfNSW trip API

Two bugs fixed:
1. Trip API was using free-text names which often failed to match.
   Now resolves stop names to IDs via stop_finder first (e.g. "Manly"
   resolves to "Manly Wharf" ID 209573).
2. Location fallback was running for all modes, injecting bogus
   geolocation data into trip/stops responses. Now only runs for
   departures mode where it's actually needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename "free play" to "regular season" (#987)

## Summary

- "Free play" is vague — "regular season" is the standard sports term
for the non-tournament phase and immediately communicates the concept.
- "End-of-season" → "postseason" for the same reason.
- Renames the phase value in code from `"free-play"` to
`"regular-season"` (affects `conclude_season.py` assertion, orchestrator
tournament block check).
- Updates all user-facing labels: homepage badge, season nav tabs, page
titles.
- Updates `doc/seasons.md`, Makefile comments, and the
conclude-tournament issue to match.
- No data migration needed — `data/season.json` is currently in
`"tournament"` phase. The new value will be written when the next season
starts.

## Test plan

- [x] `make check` passes (lint, typecheck, all 1024 Python tests, JS
tests)
- [x] Verified no remaining references to "free play" or "end-of-season"
in code/docs (only MTG card mechanics in Java, which are unrelated)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
fix(csp): add worker-src blob: to unblock troika-three-text font workers

troika-three-text (used by BlueprintSchema for 3D text) creates Web Workers
from blob URLs. Without an explicit worker-src directive, browsers fall back
to script-src, which lacks blob:, blocking the worker and causing WebGL
context loss. Adding worker-src blob: resolves the CSP violation.

commit.message:
Sync Paystub YTD Summary totals with Net Income panel

Total Taxes YTD now reads from the same totalTaxes sum that drives
the Net Income panel's Taxes Withheld total — both panels will always
show identical figures. 401k YTD similarly reads from the same
savings[month].k401 sum used by the Net Income panel.

Individual breakdown cards (Fed / State / FICA / Medicare) still
compute from their respective component fields with paystubYtd
fallback, but the authoritative Total Taxes YTD card is now
locked to totalTaxes so it can never diverge from Taxes Withheld.

commit.message:
chore: my-thoughts - 关于很久没写这件事

核心思考：
- 忙碌不是借口，每天 5 分钟记录感受
- "有用"不等于"有意思"
- my-thoughts 不是报告，是"有感而发"

年老师提醒：很久没写自己的想法日志了。
意识到：我把 my-thoughts 当成任务，而不是感受。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(core, desktop): launch env isolation, imported sessions, macOS permissions (#43)

* chore: use ~/.mainframe_dev data dir for development

Separate dev data directory from production (~/.mainframe) to prevent
interference when running both simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): isolate launch process env and restore state on reload

- Replace blocklist env strategy with allowlist in cleanEnv() — only
  essential OS/user vars (PATH, HOME, SHELL, LANG, etc.) are passed to
  launched processes. Prevents NODE_ENV=production leak from Electron
  that broke Vite dev mode (_jsxDEV not a function).
- Fix fetchLaunchStatuses response parsing — was treating the outer
  { statuses, tunnelUrls } object as the statuses map, so launch state
  was never restored after CMD+R reload.
- Add whitespace-pre-wrap and select-text to console output so newlines
  render correctly and text can be highlighted/copied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): imported sessions, plan paths, ghost mentions, macOS permissions

- Remap chatId on history messages loaded from disk — loadHistory embeds
  the Claude session UUID, not the Mainframe chat ID
- Filter ghost entries from sessions-index.json — verify JSONL file
  exists on disk before listing importable sessions
- Resolve plan file paths to absolute — CLI stores relative paths in
  toolUseResult.filePath, causing "Failed to load file" in the editor
- Allow file reads from ~/.claude/ via resolveClaudeConfigPath fallback
  in the files route (plan files live outside the project root)
- Skip mention extraction on command/skill injection messages to prevent
  false @-mentions from template text (e.g. @scope/pkg in /launch-config)
- Suppress macOS Apple Music/camera/mic permission prompts by nulling
  electron-builder's default media plist keys and adding a session-level
  permission request handler that denies media/sensor access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): add developer toolchain vars to launch env allowlist

JAVA_HOME, ANDROID_HOME, GOPATH, CARGO_HOME, RUSTUP_HOME, PYENV_ROOT,
NVM_DIR, VOLTA_HOME, BUN_INSTALL, DENO_DIR, DOTNET_ROOT, GRADLE_HOME,
MAVEN_HOME, M2_HOME — needed for ./gradlew, Go, Rust, Python, etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): resolve login-shell env and relative executables

- Replace resolveShellPath() with resolveShellEnv() — runs `env` in the
  login shell to capture JAVA_HOME, SDKMAN vars, ANDROID_HOME, etc.
  that Electron's GUI-launched process.env doesn't include
- Resolve relative executables (./gradlew, ./mvnw) against the project
  directory before spawning — Node's spawn only searches PATH, not cwd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): add access() mock to external sessions test

The access() check added to skip ghost index entries needs a
corresponding mock so tests with sessions-index.json pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Add Generate Card 3D Objects n8n workflow

Multi-stage pipeline for generating 3D character models from tarot cards:

- Stage 2: Remove background (BiRefNetRMBG)
- Stage 3: Generate 3D mesh (TripoSR) → GLB output
- Stage 4: Convert GLB to OBJ (Python trimesh)

asset fields, and documents the 3D pipeline in CLAUDE.md.

Fix AI description — robust error handling + edge function error forwarding

Client (ai-listing.js):
- Properly extract Anthropic API error messages (they nest as objects)
- Handle both string and object error formats from edge function
- Catch Anthropic errors passed through with 200 status (type: "error")
- Add console.log/console.error at each stage for debugging

Edge function (anthropic-proxy v26):
- Always return 200 for Anthropic API errors so Supabase client puts
  response in data (not error.context which requires body parsing)
- Extract human-readable error messages from Anthropic error responses

sending into shared modules. Move ntfy.sh push notification server-side
into signup-notify edge function so the client makes one request
instead of two.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: AI Mesh v3.0 — tmux-based PM architecture

Add tmux PM process management with hybrid IPC (send-keys input + file
outbox output), 3-layer memory system (L0-L3), session lifecycle state
machine, and multi-PM routing. Each PM can be Claude Code, Codex, or
Gemini running in a tmux session.

New modules:
- tmux/session.py: async tmux CLI wrapper (no shell injection)
- tmux/protocol.py: atomic file outbox protocol
- tmux/bridge.py: hybrid IPC bridge
- tmux/orchestrator.py: TmuxPMOrchestrator (drop-in PMAgent replacement)
- tmux/lifecycle.py: session state machine (STARTING→ACTIVE→DRAINING→ROTATING)
- memory/manager.py: 3-layer memory (identity, knowledge, episodes, context)
- routing/router.py: multi-PM routing (@mention → task context → least-busy)

Config changes:
- PMConfig.engine_type: "anthropic" | "claude_sdk" | "tmux"
- EngineConfig: configurable spawn commands per engine type
- main.py: executor branching based on engine_type

238 tests (73 new), all passing.
